vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: Adjusting permissions on the backup shadow file (/etc/shadow-) does not affect the active authentication process. Removing read/write/execute permissions hardens the system against unauthorized disclosure of password hashes without risking lockout or service disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Typo in file path could leave the backup file unprotected; If the backup file is needed for recovery, overly restrictive permissions might impede restore procedures
